overall.description: A first-person walk through a futuristic cyberpunk city, beginning in a covered neon-lit walkway with digital billboards, transitioning to an open pedestrian street lined with cherry blossom trees and commercial buildings, then continuing along a busy street with vehicle traffic and a magazine vendor. The footage is from a video game engine with cinematic quality and vivid neon color grading.

segments.scene_description: The segment shows a first-person walk through a covered cyberpunk walkway illuminated by green neon lights and large digital billboards displaying faces. The ceiling is low with exposed metal beams, and the floor has illuminated metal grating. Sparse pedestrians walk ahead in the same direction as the camera moves toward a bright exit at the far end.

passing Kutsurogi Cafe with neon signage on the right

segments.scene_description: The camera emerges from the covered walkway into a bright, open pedestrian street lined with pink cherry blossom trees. The Kutsurogi Cafe with its distinctive yellow facade and neon signage appears on the right. Tall futuristic buildings with glass facades and holographic billboards rise on both sides, while pedestrians walk along the wet reflective pavement.

segments.scene_description: The scene transitions to a busier urban street with vehicle traffic on the left. Red paper lanterns hang overhead on the left side. The camera passes a magazine stand with a vendor leaning on the green metal railing. Futuristic vehicles drive past on the wet road as the camera approaches a traffic intersection with overhead signals and a speed limit sign showing 40.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from a claustrophobic, neon-lit corridor into a sprawling, vibrant cyberpunk cityscape. It begins within a covered walkway of green neon lights and digital billboards, moving across illuminated metal grating toward a bright exit. As the camera emerges from the tunnel, the environment opens into a bright pedestrian street where pink cherry blossom trees contrast with the yellow facade of the Kutsurogi Cafe and towering holographic billboards. The scene then shifts toward a busier urban thoroughfare, passing under red paper lanterns and by a magazine vendor leaning on a green railing. Finally, the camera advances along the wet, reflective road past futuristic vehicle traffic toward a traffic intersection marked by overhead signals and a speed limit sign.
